productDisplayName: DKNY Women White Dial Chronograph Watch NY4985
description: Case style: Analogue watch with a circular case and a stainless steel back and a fixed bezel with embellishmentsDial style: White dial with steel-toned markings, has steel-toned hour and minute hands with white inlay and cut-out detail, steel-toned seconds handFeatures: 3-face chronograph display, date aperture between the 4 and 5-hour marks, screw to reset the timeStrap style: Ceramic bracelet-style strap secured with a butterfly claspWater resistant up to 50 mComes in a signature DKNY caseWarranty: 2 years international warranty from the date of purchase against manufacturing defectsWarranty provided by Brand Owner / Manufacturer
